"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\tfhe-nayuki-avx.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\tfhe-nayuki-avx.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\tfhe-nayuki-avx.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe  -std=gnu++11 -g0 -march=native -O2 -DNDEBUG -funroll-loops -Wall -Werror -shared -o libtfhe-nayuki-avx.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libtfhe-nayuki-avx.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\tfhe-nayuki-avx.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\tfhe-nayuki-avx.dir\linkLibs.rsp
